steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase 'can make people feel' signals the focus on human emotions toward robots that appear too similar to humans. The contrast here is between feeling comforted (soothed) and experiencing a negative reaction due to unnerving similarity.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
D captures the shift from finding human-like qualities comforting to feeling unsettled by them, implying an intensification of discomfort.
A, B, and C each miss this contrast or provide meanings unrelated to feeling more disturbed. That matches choice D — D is correct.
